name: Strawberry Margarita
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour granulated sugar on a small plate.
2. Rub the rim of a chilled cocktail glass with the lime wedge and dip the rim of the glass in the sugar until it is coated with a frosting of sugar.
3. Fill a mixing glass with cracked ice.
4. Add tequila, strawberry liqueur, lime juice, and frozen strawberries to the mixing glass.
5. Shake well and strain into the prepared cocktail glass.
